title: Animations & Stuff
description: Animations & Stuff is a feature-rich modpack for Minecraft Java Edition, inspired by the popular Actions & Stuff addon from Bedrock Edition. This pack brings life to your gameplay experience with smooth animations and 3D models.
body:
**Animations & Stuff** is a feature-rich modpack for Minecraft Java Edition, inspired by the popular Actions & Stuff addon from Bedrock Edition. This pack brings life to your gameplay experience with smooth animations, 3D models, and immersive visual enhancements!

![animations-and-stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5244f7a1807fa926b7e3d0ce398b2720178056d_0.webp)

## ✨ Features:
- 🕺 **First-person & third-person animations** – Custom player animations that make movement and interaction feel more dynamic.

- 🗡️ **3D animated models** – Smoothly moving entities and items for a more modern and detailed aesthetic.

- 🌈 **Enchanted item outlines** – Visual enchantment glows that pop with clean outlines and better effects.

- 🏰 **Structures & exploration** – Includes Towns and Towers and other worldgen mods to enrich exploration without overloading the world with clutter.

- 🔄 Seamlessly integrates with **Fabric/Quilt** mod environments for better performance and compatibility.

Perfect for creators, roleplayers, and casual adventurers alike, Animations & Stuff enhances immersion while keeping your gameplay experience lightweight and smooth.

**Disclaimer: I do not own or develop any of the individual mods included in this modpack. All credit goes to their original creators. This modpack simply combines various existing mods into a single package to enhance the Minecraft experience. If you enjoy a specific mod, please consider supporting its developer(s) directly.**
